$doc: Cursor CLI hook registration (~/.cursor/hooks.json), symlinked from the clone. beforeShellExecution runs the guard-adapter shim; failClosed:true means a hook crash blocks. NOTE: whether cursor-agent fires this hook in headless -p mode is UNCERTAIN across versions — the static Shell(...) deny list in permissions-fragment.json (cli-config.json) is the reliable enforcement surface; this hook is defence-in-depth. Verify with the SETUP-DELTA smoke test.
